title: Lab Bench
editorialSummary: Every card is a piece of chemistry laboratory equipment. The false trail: grouping by material (glass vs. plastic) or by size will fail. The correct axis is function: heating equipment, volumetric/measuring equipment, separation equipment, and safety equipment. A 'Condenser' is for separation (distillation), not for cooling food — players who think in everyday terms misplace it. 'Aspirator' sounds like breathing equipment but is a vacuum pump (separation). Every item plausibly fits 2+ functional groups at first glance.
